mnemonics: Entities are like people, Sets are like groups of people
ER Diagrams are like Maps, they show the connections between Entities
keyPoints: Entity Types: The main type of entity in a Conceptual Model
Entity Sets: A collection of related Entity Types
Structural Constraints: Rules that define how Entities relate to each other
Weak Entity Types: Entity types that require an identifying relationship with another Entity
ER Diagrams: Visual representation of Entity Types and Relationships
Speci: Specificity - the degree to which an Entity Type is instantiated
